message:
test(contracts): add all_transitional_resolved assertion and fix pending count test

Add all_transitional_resolved() assertion to the standard audit report
test confirming all transitional surfaces are resolved. Fix the pending
transitional test to dynamically compute whether pending_transitional==0
determines the resolved state, instead of hardcoding !resolved. Add
total_count and all_transitional_resolved proptest assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
